headline: Ultra-Fast, Reliable Internet from Xfinity Now Available in Parts of Brantley County, Georgia
summary: BRANTLEY COUNTY, Ga., March 31, 2026--Comcast has expanded its network to more than 1,700 homes and businesses in three Southeast Georgia communities, bringing high-speed Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. Those Brantley County areas include Atkinson, the city of Nahunta and Waynesville. Xfinity brings Internet, mobile, entertainment, and smart home services into one simple, seamless solution – giving customers more speed, savings, and control over their connec

headline: Why Comcast (CMCSA) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of telecommunications and media company Comcast (NASDAQ:CMCSA) jumped 2% in the afternoon session after the company announced new all-in-one technology plans for small businesses and continued the expansion of its high-speed internet network.
